input_title: Pak-it Fabric Spot Remover Pak-it Remover 20 PAK-ITs/Jar - BIG597420002240 ReStockIt
input_description: Simply drop two pre-measured clear Fabric Spot Remover PAK-It s into its matching clear quart trigger spray bottle (sold separately) and add cold, tepid or warm water. Wait two minutes and shake. Adjust nozzle to mist or stream settings and spray liberally onto stain. Allow the product to sit on the stain for one to two minutes to absorb the stain. Rub gently with a hand brush or cloth. Repeat if necessary until stain is removed. Finally rinse with a little clean water and blot dry. Application: Carpet/Upholstery Spot/Stain Remover; Applicable Material: Natural Textiles; Synthetic Textiles; Carpet; Upholstery; Vinyl Composition Tile (VCT); Solid Vinyl Tile (SVT); Linoleum; Sheet Vinyl; Laminates; Terrazzo; Dirt Types: Food Debris; Grease; Grime; Organic Matter; Spills; Water-Based Soil; Scent: Pleasant.
